zh.lifeSummary: 當William Clopton於大約1383年出生在英國素福爾可朗 梅爾福德時，他的父親Thomas Clopton64歲，母親Katherine Mylde41歲。他於1402年與Margery Drury在英國素福爾可朗 梅爾福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1446年8月4日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Clopton于大约1383年出生在英国素福爾可朗 梅爾福德时，他的父亲Thomas Clopton64岁，母亲Katherine Mylde41岁。他于1402年与Margery Drury在英国素福爾可朗 梅爾福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1446年8月4日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Clopton was born about 1383, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Clopton, was 64 and his mother, Katherine Mylde, was 41. He married Margery Drury in 1402, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 August 1446, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Clopton est né environ 1383, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Clopton, avait 64 ans et sa mère, Katherine Mylde, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Margery Drury en 1402, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1446, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United K: Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Clopton um 1383 in Long Melford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Clopton 64 und seine Mutter Katherine Mylde 41. Er hat 1402 in Long Melford, Suffolk, England Margery Drury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1446 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Clopton è nato il circa 1383 nel Long Melford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Clopton, aveva 64 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Mylde, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Margery Drury nel 1402, nel Long Melford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1446, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Cloptonが約1383年にイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Cloptonは64歳，母Katherine Myldeは41歳であった。1402年にイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードでMargery Druryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1446年8月4日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Clopton(이)가 대략 1383년 영국 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Clopton(은)는 64세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Mylde(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1402년 영국 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 Margery Drury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1446년 8월 4일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Clopton nasceu aproximadamente 1383, em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Clopton, tinha 64 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Mylde, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Drury em 1402, em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1446, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Clopton родился около 1383 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Clopton было 64 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Mylde, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Drury в 1402 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 августа 1446 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Clopton nació aproximadamente 1383, en Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Clopton, tenía 64 años y su mamá, Katherine Mylde, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Margery Drury en 1402, en Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1446, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
